name: pulsemesh
description: Local-first multi-source telemetry acquisition, fusion, anomaly detection, and gate decisions for AGNT agent workflows. 13+ providers, robust median/MAD normalization, self-contained HTML dashboards, baselines, history, and go/warn/hold gates.
author: James Paul Jackson

tools.title: PulseMesh Demo Workflow
tools.description: Run the full PulseMesh telemetry mesh: acquire all sensors, fuse, evaluate alerts, render dashboard + report, update baselines. Returns complete summary with gate decision.

profiles.description: Path to profiles JSON file. Defaults to bundled AGNT profile.

tools.title: PulseMesh Acquire Sensor
tools.description: Acquire telemetry from a single sensor provider. Supports system, ping, goes_xray, openmeteo, openmeteo_air, usgs_earthquake, csv, jsonl, rss, github, synthetic.

provider.description: Provider type (system, ping, goes_xray, openmeteo, etc.).

variable.description: Variable to measure (for system provider: cpu_load, memory_used_percent, disk_free_percent, etc.).

tools.title: PulseMesh Fusion Analysis
tools.description: Run fusion analysis on acquired telemetry data. Computes health_score, anomaly_score, coherence, volatility, drift, spike_count.

values.description: JSON array of numeric values to analyze.

tools.title: PulseMesh Status
tools.description: Get the latest mesh health, alerts, fallback count, and highest anomaly from the most recent run.

tools.title: PulseMesh Gate Decision
tools.description: Return go/warn/hold decision before agent proceeds. Evaluates mesh health and anomaly thresholds.

tools.title: PulseMesh Dashboard
tools.description: Render a self-contained HTML dashboard from the latest run summary. Includes SVG sparklines, health coloring, alerts panel.

tools.title: PulseMesh Compare Runs
tools.description: Compare two run summaries. Shows health_delta, anomaly_delta, coherence_delta per sensor.

tools.title: PulseMesh Providers
tools.description: List all available telemetry providers with their capabilities and required parameters.

tools.title: PulseMesh Sync to AGNT
tools.description: Sync collected telemetry into AGNT observability. Updates baselines, summarizes history, and returns a gate decision for agent workflows.

history_limit.description: Number of runs to include in history summary.
